refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify compliance with customer-defined limits.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive bitrate and error correction algorithms to reduce packet loss.
DP2: Use redundant communication channels to ensure packet delivery.
DP3: Real-time packet loss monitoring and feedback control loop.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive bitrate and error correction algorithms to reduce packet loss.

potential_sources: Interaction between adaptive bitrate control and error correction algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically encapsulates the solution to maintain packet loss within limits with manageable coupling between sub-functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk that adaptive algorithms may not respond quickly enough to sudden network degradation.
Risk of increased latency due to error correction overhead.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time network condition monitoring to improve responsiveness of adaptive algorithms.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software and hardware modules responsible for teleoperation communication and control.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface for sending and receiving teleoperation data packets over the network.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report communication quality metrics including packet loss.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Interface to receive teleoperation commands and tasks.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused containment of teleoperation-specific logic.
Vehicle module primarily physical; limited containment of teleoperation communication logic.
Highest containment score; centralizes teleoperation communication and control logic.
Safety services interface with communication but do not contain teleoperation packet loss logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning the DP to the Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential dependency on network link quality managed outside Teleoperation module.
Risk of insufficient integration with Safety Services for safety-critical alerts.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Establish clear interface contracts with Safety Services and NGHE Solution modules to mitigate integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive bitrate and error correction) directly addresses the refined FR with clear verification methods and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion if error correction algorithms are duplicated across modules.
Risk of interface complexity with Network Link and Safety Services.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment of DP with minimal diffusion, supporting clear ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring packet loss metrics via Telemetry interface and validating against customer limits.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility to Teleoperation module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Enhance interface definitions with Safety Services for safety-critical communication alerts.
Incorporate network condition monitoring to improve adaptive algorithm responsiveness.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition level is complete with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. Gate reviews pass with manageable risks and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system components.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Teleoperation module has sufficient control over communication parameters.
open_risks: Latency impact due to error correction overhead.
Integration risks with Safety Services for safety-critical alerts.
evidence_needed: Performance data on adaptive bitrate and error correction effectiveness.
Verification results of packet loss under various network conditions.
